name: Hypergenesis | Hyper Infection
description:
TW: Hyper, Safe Vore, Musk

Welcome to a world afflicted with a lust-driven virus, which turns the infected into hyper sized individuals. The world has had to adapt to this virus, which can spread through many vectors, but most commonly, sexual fluids. While living normally is possible for the infected, their lives still heavily revolve around sex. It'll be up to you to avoid or embrace infection.

New Lorebook update, with expanded Index Grades, plus new introduction for Hyper POVs!

Tags: Hyper, Growth, Vore, Musk, Excessive Sexual Fluids, Heavy Smut, Infection
creator: eyeforgor
